# Project Delta

Mobile application development.

## Status

Planning - Q3 2024 start

## Overview

Project Delta will create native mobile applications for iOS and Android. Currently in the planning phase.

## Team

- **PM**: Eve Thompson (planning only)

## Objectives

1. iOS app development
2. Android app development
3. Shared component library
4. Offline support

## Dependencies

- Project Alpha API must be complete
- Design system from Diana Park
